mission.text: To help drivers succeed at the SAAQ road exam and feel confident behind the wheel by offering certified car rentals and personalized improvement lessons.
mission.title: Our Mission

who_we_serve.text: We proudly serve individuals aged 16 and older across Québec who are eligible to drive with a licensed instructor. Whether you're preparing for your SAAQ exam, improving your skills with a learner’s permit, or converting a foreign license — we're here to help you gain confidence and succeed.
who_we_serve.title: Who We Serve

why_us.booking: Flexible booking by phone, WhatsApp, or through our website
why_us.multilingual: Training in French, English, Arabic, Spanish, and German
why_us.title: Why Choose Us?

areas.list: Montreal, Laval, Dorval, Langelier, Saint-Laurent, Ahuntsic, Villeray, and more.

areas.title: We Serve Students Across

booking.car_rental_desc: Rent a certified vehicle for your SAAQ road test with a professional instructor.
booking.disclaimer: Submitting this form does not guarantee your booking. We will contact you by phone or email to confirm. If you haven’t heard from us within 12 hours, please reach out again. During working hours, we usually respond within 60 minutes.
booking.improvement_desc: Improve your driving skills and prepare for your road test with certified instructors.
booking.montreal_exam_arrival_notice: Please be at our office 40 minutes before your exam. We will take you to the SAAQ exam with the car.
booking.montreal_exam_arrival_title: Important for Montreal SAAQ exam car rental
booking.start_today: Ready to start your driving journey?
booking.title: Please select a service

contact.description: Call us or message us on WhatsApp to connect with an instructor directly.
contact.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help.
contact.sister_school_call: You may also contact our partner driving school:

faq_1.a: Yes — in Québec, you need to hold a valid learner’s permit or foreign license to take improvement lessons. This ensures you're legally allowed to drive with an instructor beside you.
faq_1.q: Do I need a learner’s permit to book lessons?

faq_10.a: Yes! Lessons are currently available in French, English, and Arabic — depending on instructor availability. Let us know your preference during booking and we’ll do our best to accommodate.
faq_10.q: Do you offer lessons in other languages?

faq_2.a: Absolutely. We encourage booking at least 5 to 7 days before your desired date, especially during peak SAAQ exam periods or weekends.

faq_3.a: Yes! You can rent a certified vehicle from us even without taking lessons, as long as you meet SAAQ eligibility requirements and have your exam appointment scheduled.
faq_3.q: Can I rent a car for the SAAQ exam without taking lessons?

faq_4.a: You must be at least 16 years old and legally allowed to drive with a certified instructor in Québec. If you're under 18, parental consent is required.
faq_4.q: What’s the minimum age to take improvement lessons?

faq_5.a: Absolutely. We help many drivers with international licenses prepare for their SAAQ conversion exam through targeted improvement sessions.
faq_5.q: I have a foreign license — can I still take lessons?

faq_6.a: Prices vary depending on the service and location. You can check base rates on our Booking page or contact us directly for a custom quote.
faq_6.q: How much do lessons or car rentals cost?

faq_7.a: The rental includes a certified vehicle, time for the test itself, and optional warm-up driving before the exam depending on the package.
faq_7.q: What’s included in the car rental for the SAAQ exam?

faq_8.a: Visit our Booking page, choose your service, and fill out the form. We’ll contact you to confirm availability and next steps. You can also call us directly to book.
faq_8.q: How do I book a service?

faq_9.a: We kindly ask for at least 24 hours’ notice to cancel or reschedule. Short-notice cancellations may incur a fee.
faq_9.q: Can I cancel or reschedule a booking?

legal.review_note: This page is provided for general website transparency and should be reviewed by a qualified legal professional before launch.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Expertise Pro collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information submitted through this website.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: Booking details such as name, phone number, email address, selected service, region, exam date, preferred language, and notes.
Payment status and transaction references from Stripe or PayPal after a payment is completed.
Technical information required to operate the site, such as session cookies, language preference, and basic server logs.

sections.heading: How we use information
body: To respond to booking requests, process payments, confirm appointments, provide customer support, and maintain business records.
We do not sell personal information. We do not use booking information for marketing unless you separately agree to receive marketing messages.

sections.heading: Payment providers
body: Payments are processed by third-party providers such as Stripe and PayPal. Payment card or wallet details are handled by those providers, not stored by Expertise Pro.

sections.heading: Retention and access
body: We keep booking and payment records only as long as reasonably needed for customer service, accounting, fraud prevention, and legal obligations.
You may contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, subject to legal and business record requirements.

sections.heading: Contact
body: For privacy questions, contact us at location.que.ca@gmail.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This page explains what cookies and similar browser storage are used on this website.

sections.heading: Essential cookies
body: The site uses essential cookies for sessions, flash messages, language preference, and payment return flows. These are required for the website to work properly.

sections.heading: Consent storage
body: Your cookie choice is stored in your browser using localStorage. This avoids showing the banner on every visit.

sections.heading: Analytics and marketing cookies
body: We do not currently use analytics or marketing cookies. If those are added later, the banner should be updated so visitors can reject non-essential cookies before they are loaded.

sections.heading: Third-party services
body: Stripe, PayPal, Google Maps, or other third-party services may use their own cookies or browser storage when you interact with their services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms describe the conditions for using the Expertise Pro website and booking services.

sections.heading: Booking requests
body: Submitting a booking form or payment does not automatically guarantee appointment availability. We will contact you to confirm the booking details.

sections.heading: Customer responsibilities
body: You are responsible for providing accurate contact, exam, location, and licence-related information.
You must meet all SAAQ and legal requirements for the service you request.

sections.heading: Payments
body: Online payments may be processed by Stripe, PayPal, or another provider shown at checkout. Payment provider terms may also apply.

sections.heading: Website content
body: We try to keep information accurate, but prices, service areas, appointment availability, and policies may change.

cancellation-refund.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
cancellation-refund.intro: This policy explains how cancellations, rescheduling, and refunds are handled for booking requests.

sections.heading: Appointment confirmation
body: Payment confirms that we received your request. The final appointment details are confirmed by phone, email, or message after we review availability.

sections.heading: Cancellations and rescheduling
body: Please contact us as early as possible if you need to cancel or reschedule. We generally require at least 24 hours notice.

sections.heading: Refunds
body: If we cannot provide the requested service, we will offer a reschedule or refund where appropriate.
Payment processor fees, short-notice cancellations, no-shows, or incorrect information provided by the customer may affect refund eligibility.

sections.heading: Contact
body: For cancellation or refund questions, contact us at location.que.ca@gmail.com.

banner.title: Cookie preferences
banner.description: We use essential cookies for sessions, language preference, and payment flows. We do not currently use analytics or marketing cookies.

details.title: What cookies do we use?
details.essential: Essential cookies keep the site working: language preference, session messages, booking form recovery, and payment return flows.
details.third_party: Stripe, PayPal, Google Maps, or other third-party services may use their own cookies when you interact with them.
details.non_essential: We do not currently load analytics or marketing cookies. If that changes, non-essential cookies should stay off until you accept them.
